Interface IFocalStatisticsFilter2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a focal statistics filter.

[Guid("831BCC6A-9BCD-4285-A9EE-ADBC296D93FF")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IFocalStatisticsFilter2 : IFocalStatisticsFilter

Properties

FillNoDataOnly

Option to fill only no data with pixel value.

bool FillNoDataOnly { get; set; }

Property Value

bool
